playbook.intent: Disconnected design system -> token edits propagate end-to-end with PR governance + drift audit.
playbook.scope: DS lead establishes the lifecycle from token source -> Figma library -> Storybook -> consumer apps. Includes PR governance, visual regression, drift audit, and a breaking-change process. Done when token edits propagate cleanly, drift stays under threshold, and governance review runs monthly.

success-criteria.criterion: Token edits propagate to Figma + Storybook + apps without manual reposting
PR review checklist enforced in CI
Visual regression green for >=2 consecutive cycles
Drift audit under threshold for >=4 weeks

stage.name: Pick source of truth
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when ownership is named.

stage.name: Build pipeline

tasks.task: Wire token build to web + mobile + Figma

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when token edit propagates end-to-end.

stage.name: Storybook as truth
stage.intent: Components live in Storybook, not Figma.

tasks.task: Wire components to tokens in Storybook
Add a11y addon + visual regression suite

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when Storybook is the published reference.

stage.name: Figma <-> code

tasks.task: Add Code Connect mappings per component

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when coverage is >=80% on base components.

stage.name: PR governance

tasks.task: Add design review checklist to PR template
Require two reviewers for breaking changes

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when checklist runs on every PR.

stage.name: Visual regression

tasks.task: Wire visual regression on Storybook builds

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when suite has been green 2 cycles.

stage.name: Governance + drift
stage.intent: Monthly review keeps the system honest.

tasks.task: Hold a governance review with consumers

stage.decision-gate: Done when monthly cadence is sustained.

extra.value: [Treating Figma as the source of truth -> code drifts, No PR governance -> breaking changes ship unnoticed, No monthly review -> drift accumulates silently]
['Does a token edit reach apps without manual steps?', 'Are PRs blocked on visual regression?', 'Is the governance cadence sustained?']

{human: faion get-content design-system-as-code-lifecycle-tokens-storybook-figma-library-pr-governance --format md, agent: faion get-content design-system-as-code-lifecycle-tokens-storybook-figma-library-pr-governance --format context, json: faion get-content design-system-as-code-lifecycle-tokens-storybook-figma-library-pr-governance --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
